ticket.subject: We have noticed that orders 8885 and 8888 are not ...
ticket.raw_subject: We have noticed that orders 8885 and 8888 are not ...
ticket.description:
We have noticed that orders 8885 and 8888 are not syncing and therefore cannot be shipped. We update plugins and resync store from WooCommerce. Order 8885 did receive PluginHive Transaction ID of dbdef9c7-330f-4345-92c9-21c8f015daf1. 

Can you help us discover what went wrong?

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-w.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/summary/03e72b22-1c48-40c8-b2ce-ba5053773197/9c9132aa-2722-47db-b28b-a19313108a92/new

comments.body:
Hello Mike,

Thank you for sharing the details.

We were able to login to the store.

When we checked the WP JSON Response of the store, we are getting the error message "Failed ( 403 :: Forbidden )" as Response.

So, due to this webhook syncing is failing and the orders have not imported to the plugin.

Could you check about this from your end and rectify this and let us know once done.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/US5YxHgt7oQpS9hzO0FirQ1Nx/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Mike,
 
Thank you for sharing the details. 
 
We were able to login to the store. 
 
When we checked the WP JSON Response of the store, we are getting the error message "Failed ( 403 :: Forbidden )" as Response. 
 
So, due to this webhook syncing is failing and the orders have not imported to the plugin. 
 
Could you check about this from your end and rectify this and let us know once done.
 

 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello, I also spoke to Bluehost and they do not see any issues with your webhooks. They ask if you could verify if your requests include the correct authentication tokens, headers, and IP addresses.


The WP-JSON loads fine in a browser. Webhooks are delivering successfully (200 OK). The issue is specifically the WP-JSON 403 in your diagnostic tool and the 'Failed to import product' error. The authenticated user is 'andy' with Administrator role. Please advise on how to fully disconnect and reconnect the store to generate fresh API credentials.



Mike
comments.html_body:
Hello, I also spoke to Bluehost and they do not see any issues with your webhooks. They ask if you could verify if your requests include the correct authentication tokens, headers, and IP addresses.

The WP-JSON loads fine in a browser. Webhooks are delivering successfully (200 OK). The issue is specifically the WP-JSON 403 in your diagnostic tool and the 'Failed to import product' error. The authenticated user is 'andy' with Administrator role. Please advise on how to fully disconnect and reconnect the store to generate fresh API credentials.

Mike

comments.body:
Need L3 assistance:

The customer reported that the orders are not getting imported to the plugin.
We have checked the settings and below are our findings:

- The re-sync is failing.
- Syncing of webhooks are also failing
- Checked the webhooks in the Advanced settings and there were duplicates. We cleared and re-sync but not seeing any webhooks.
- Tried to re-sync from WooCommerce settings, it is successful but still not seeing the webhooks.
- Ensured that the store URL is same and confirm that.
- JSON response is showing failed in the debugger. But when checked with the https://secondshotmarket.com/wp-json link it is successful as we are getting the response.

I have attached the screenshots for reference.

WP Admin access is provided below:
https://secondshotmarket.com/wp-admin/
Username: support@pluginhive.com
Password: 53OTjUR8H5oNt4$o

Please provide assistance.

Store Details:
Store URL: https://secondshotmarket.com
Carrier: UPS and Stamps USPS
Was active till Jan 2026 for labels.
Plan: $29 Popular
Payment receiving.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/zP4eHHXq24GI6de6efYi2W0MD/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/jkqXZfo5oIkfmxOsEbmqyiw97/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/jYD3AmOzor5NkJxV7GALCLwkB/?name=image.png)

**Slack Thread:** https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1774595992171149
comments.html_body:
Need L3 assistance:
 
The customer reported that the orders are not getting imported to the plugin.
We have checked the settings and below are our findings:
  • The re-sync is failing.
  • Syncing of webhooks are also failing
  • Checked the webhooks in the Advanced settings and there were duplicates. We cleared and re-sync but not seeing any webhooks.
  • Tried to re-sync from WooCommerce settings, it is successful but still not seeing the webhooks.
  • Ensured that the store URL is same and confirm that.
  • JSON response is showing failed in the debugger. But when checked with the https://secondshotmarket.com/wp-json link it is successful as we are getting the response.
 
I have attached the screenshots for reference.
 
WP Admin access is provided below:
https://secondshotmarket.com/wp-admin/
Username: support@pluginhive.com
Password: 53OTjUR8H5oNt4$o
 
Please provide assistance.
 
Store Details:
Store URL: https://secondshotmarket.com
Carrier: UPS and Stamps USPS
Was active till Jan 2026 for labels.
Plan: $29 Popular
Payment receiving.

comments.body:
Hello,


I am not aware of any security changes. The website is still getting quotes for carts. I tried to resync but now I see everything is deleted.
 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/7f7sTfw9Un1WhD7EQ9NIpDueQ/?name=image.png)

There is nothing on my end that shows why the app stopped working after Feb 7th.



What can you provide me with to look at?



Mike
comments.html_body:
Hello,

I am not aware of any security changes. The website is still getting quotes for carts. I tried to resync but now I see everything is deleted.
There is nothing on my end that shows why the app stopped working after Feb 7th.

What can you provide me with to look at?

Mike
comments.plain_body:

  There is nothing on my end that shows why the app stopped working after Feb 7th.

comments.body:
Hello Mike,

Thank you for your response.

Could you please let us know if you have installed any new plugin recently on your store?

Additionally, to check your case further, we would require your permission to disable other plugins on your store and keep only our plugin and WooCommerce plugin enabled. This will help us in determining if any plugin is causing interference with ours.

Awaiting your response and permission.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Mike,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
Could you please let us know if you have installed any new plugin recently on your store?
 
Additionally, to check your case further, we would require your permission to disable other plugins on your store and keep only our plugin and WooCommerce plugin enabled. This will help us in determining if any plugin is causing interference with ours.
 
Awaiting your response and permission.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
We have investigated the issue and found that your store's Cloudflare security settings are blocking requests from our servers, which are located in the United States.
Please check for any Country or Bot Block Rules
Go to Security → WAF → Custom Rules — check for any rule blocking United States and disable it
Or Go to Security → Bots — if Bot Fight Mode or Super Bot Fight Mode is enabled, either turn it off
-[Athul]
comments.html_body:

system.client: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

comments.body:
Hello Mike Miller,

Thank you for your patience.

Our team has investigated your case further and found that your store's Cloudflare security settings are blocking requests from our servers, which are located in the United States.

I request you to please check for any Country or Bot Block Rules and update them if needed.

For this, go to Security → WAF → Custom Rules — check for any rule blocking United States and disable it.
Or, Go to Security → Bots — if Bot Fight Mode or Super Bot Fight Mode is enabled, either turn it off.

Post this, please try initiating the order imports in the plugin and let us know how it goes.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Mike Miller,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
Our team has investigated your case further and found that your store's Cloudflare security settings are blocking requests from our servers, which are located in the United States.
 
I request you to please check for any Country or Bot Block Rules and update them if needed.
 
For this, go to Security → WAF → Custom Rules — check for any rule blocking United States and disable it.
Or, Go to Security → Bots — if Bot Fight Mode or Super Bot Fight Mode is enabled, either turn it off.
 
Post this, please try initiating the order imports in the plugin and let us know how it goes.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
